title: Review: relay round 11 (security/correctness)
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — three P1 DoS vectors require authenticated access but no subscription (GROUP_ADD/LEAVE rate limit gap, TYPING global broadcast amplification, WHISPER to phantom pub_ids polluting offline queue). MERCHANT_NETWORK silent failure is a deployment footgun. Core correctness (PoW replay, auth, payment activation atomicity, group membership cap) is solid.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: payment_watcher scan logic depends on lightwalletd protocol details not visible here; multi-instance bus delivery not exercised (nie-kef6.16 already filed). Would raise confidence if: integration tests existed for payment_watcher with a mock lightwalletd; GROUP_ADD TOCTOU between is_group_member and add_group_member_capped was tested concurrently.
